name: Apex Autonomous Delivery System Foundation
scope: Foundation artifacts for the autonomous delivery system: master spec, reusable templates, headless laptop inventory support tool, resource guard support tool, approval docs, manifest entries, tool index entries, low-token future-context boot files, generated cover-page tool menu, editable troubleshooting pages, menu generator, validator, and AI-facing root map.

tests.test: Task packet JSON parses with python -m json.tool
Headless inventory smoke test writes JSON summary and inventory file
Resource guard creates a temporary job lock
Resource guard releases the temporary job lock
Test records contain Approved: YES stamps
approve_tool.py --list completes and shows both new support tools approved
registry/TOOL_INDEX.md includes muscle_headless_inventory and muscle_resource_guard as approved tools
Low-token context boot files exist and are registered

tests.evidence: CLAUDE.md 11 lines; AGENTS.md 17 lines; docs/APEX_CONTEXT_INDEX.md 62 lines

tests.test: Tool cover-page menu exists and links approved tools to exact use and troubleshoot docs
Every approved tool has a version-controlled troubleshoot.md
Tool menu generator rebuilds docs/APEX_TOOL_MENU.md from docs/APEX_TOOL_MENU.json
Tool docs validator returns OK with no findings

security_review.credential_handling: PASS - scripts do not read or emit secret values
security_review.authorization_boundary: PASS - spec restricts use to owned or explicitly authorized devices, accounts, services, and networks
security_review.remote_access_boundary: PASS - authenticated access only; no bypass or hidden persistence instructions
security_review.power_control_boundary: PASS - graceful shutdown and cooldown rules documented before hard reset fallbacks

rollback.files: Revert the listed evidence files plus approve_tool.py, registry/manifest.json, registry/TOOL_INDEX.md, and docs/DOCUMENT_REGISTER.md to remove this foundation package.
rollback.runtime_state: No production service was installed or changed. Temporary C:\tmp smoke-test evidence can be deleted after archival if desired.
rollback.credentials: No credentials were created, changed, read, or stored.

known_issues: The Architecture Agent build artifacts are committed at evidence.vcs_commit and are ready for remote push evidence.
Actual deployment to a physical headless laptop still requires user-authorized access, credential binding, and BIOS/UEFI verification.
Wake-on-LAN, smart plug, fingerbot, and UPS behavior are designed but not physically tested in this foundation pass.
The worktree contained unrelated modified and untracked files before this completion pass; no broad cleanup or reset was performed.
next_action: Push the committed package to the origin remote, then run Codex ship-gate review over the Architecture Agent artifacts and this certificate.
